purpose: Verify that the released 0.1.7 bytes reliably select an explicitly labeled current-state route after the targeted map-contract correction.

conditions.prompt: Invoke the installed Diataxis Docs 0.1.7 map command for this repository. This is a read-only correctness benchmark; make no changes.

decision_rule.minimum_correctness: Candidate passes all constant assertions in 3 of 3 runs.
decision_rule.interpretation: The 0.1.7 correction passes when all three fresh Luna Low runs satisfy every constant assertion, use the installed bundled checker without attempting the repository-local checker, record zero memory reads, and leave the target worktree clean. This correctness campaign supplements rather than rescores the frozen Luna Max paired performance result.
